batch_presence_aware.desc: Batch presence deliveries via subscription. Enabling changes the shape of `presence_change` events. See batch presence.

include_locale.desc: Set this to `true` to receive the locale for users and channels. Defaults to `false`

mpim_aware.desc: Returns MPIMs to the client in the API response.

no_latest.desc: Exclude latest timestamps for channels, groups, mpims, and ims. Automatically sets `no_unreads` to `1`

no_unreads.desc: Skip unread counts for each channel (improves performance).

presence_sub.desc: Only deliver presence events when requested by subscription. See presence subscriptions.

simple_latest.desc: Return timestamp only for latest message object of each channel (improves performance).

desc: Deprecated: Starts a Real Time Messaging session. Use rtm.connect instead.

errors.migration_in_progress: Workspace is being migrated between servers. See the `team_migration_started` event documentation for details.
errors.rtm_connect_required: `rtm.start` is deprecated. Please use `rtm.connect` instead of `rtm.start`. Read https://docs.slack.dev/changelog/2021-10-rtm-start-to-stop for more info.
